full_text:
Zhang Jian (Yuanjie) 張儉 (元節)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Jian (張儉), styledYuanjie (元節), was born in Shanyang. Much admired, thousands of people died helping him flee. Aware of Cao Cao’s ambitions. Zhang Jian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Jian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
